name: broker_routing_failure
title: Broker Smart Order Router Failure
description: Simulates a scenario where the broker's smart order router cannot find a viable venue for order routing.
background: Multiple venues simultaneously experience data feed issues. The broker's SOR attempts to find the best price but all venues report stale or no data. This tests the fallback routing logic, venue health monitoring, and the system's ability to queue orders and retry when venues recover.

steps.action: Establish baseline with all venues healthy
steps.expected_state: 3+ venues connected, all quoting, broker routing OK

steps.action: Disconnect XNYS and XLON market data feeds simultaneously
steps.expected_state: Only XTSE remains active; routing options severely limited

steps.action: Route a buy order for a symbol only listed on XNYS (e.g., JPM)
steps.expected_state: No venue has fresh JPM data; order either queued, rejected, or sent to last-known venue with flag

steps.action: Monitor broker status for routing failure metrics
steps.expected_state: routing_log_tail shows failed routes; orders_routed may stall

steps.action: Restore all venues and verify order processing resumes
steps.expected_state: All venues reconnect; queued orders process; routing resumes
